reviews.review_title: Sad note from the head co owner here..
reviews.review_description:
So about a month ago the game got hacked so unfortunately the servers have been down, BUT don’t worry as we are making a new game called Project Snow V2 which will be in winter 23 if I’m not wrong and yes I will still be y’all’s favourite co owner 😉


Side note fishes review was exaggerated and we did not have custom maps but we did have everything else😶

Please can I get unbanned because I just got the game (about to change my name in stump) and a moderator spam reports me for not changing my name and he was saying change your name in which I said I’m about to do it I just came from tutorial I just got this game and by the time I was changing my name the moderator bans me like no need to automatically report when he saw jump from tutorial and didn’t have any type of long arms 
Thank you
I really love this game I really want to be admin on please and thank you 😢￼

reviews.review_title: can i please get the stick
reviews.review_description: this game is the best in the world
Meh it’s not the best but not the worst 😐

How can someone make a game so fun and entertaining 

Out of any gtag fan game/ copy this is the best and what I would prefer out of ANY one of them I can’t genuinely believe a game this good can exist props to the owners because the content is INSANE

1. Custom maps!

2. CUSTOM SHIRTS????

3. Great community

I genuinely can’t believe a game this good can exist I cannot handle something so good I DEFINITELY RECOMMEND TO ANYONE WHOS LOOKING FOR GAMES

I am a mod in the game and it’s so fun, sadly the servers got hacked so the servers don’t work in game anymore but the owners are making project snow v2 so join the discord to be updated when the game comes out!
This game is fun and all but for some reason when I write this review, I saw that me and my friend owned this game so please fix it because I don’t own it￼
